issues.title: LDraw geometry is bounding-box only — sub-part files not downloaded
issues.description: The 18 downloaded `.dat` files mostly reference sub-parts (e.g. `s\3001s01.dat`) that we don't have. `Piece.get_geometry()` falls back to dimension-accurate bounding boxes. This is sufficient for collision detection and layout (Sprints 3-4), but the renderer (Sprint 4) will need detailed meshes for visual fidelity. Either download the full LDraw parts library or fetch the specific sub-part files.

tasks.text: Download LDraw sub-part files (`s/` directory) for all 18 pieces
Update `_parse_ldraw_dat` to resolve type-1 subfile references recursively
Verify rendered meshes visually match expected brick shapes
